verses.text: Saul in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmthum pha a, kum sawmnih leh kum nih sung Israel-te a uk hi

Saul in Israel-te mihing tul thum teel hi. Tul nihte Mikmash leh Bethel mualtung gamah Saul tawh om a, tul khatte Benjamin gamsung Gibeah-ah a tapa Jonathan tawh om uh a, midang a omlaite amau' inn a puanbuk ciat uhah amah in ciahsak hi
Jonathan in Geba-ah a om Filistia-te' khuacingte zo a, Filistia-te in tua thu za uh hi. Tua ciangin Saul in gam khempeuhah peengkul tum a, “Hebru mi khempeuh zasak un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Saul in Filistia khuacingte a zawhna leh Filistia-te-a' dingin Israel-te a huathuai ahihna zong Israel-te khempeuh in za uh hi. Gilgal-ah Saul a pawm dingin mite kisamkhia hi

Tua ciangin Israel-te tawh a kido dingin Filistia-te kikhawmin, leeng tul sawmthum, sakol galkap tul guk, leh a galkapte tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin tampi pha uh hi. Amaute hong paito-in Bethaven nisuahna lam Mikmash-ah phual sat uh hi
A galte in Israel mite neh mahmah ahih manin amaute haksatna sungah a omlam uh a kitheih uh ciangin suanghawm sung, leihawm sung, suang kawmlak, han lak, leh tuikhukte sungah bu uh a
a dangte in Jordan ngahmun kantanin Gad leh Gilead gamah galkah uh hi. Saul ahih leh Gilgal-ah omlai a, amah tawh a om mi khempeuh zong lau-in ling uh hi
Amah in Samuel' seh hun, ni sagih sung a ngak hi. Ahih hangin Gilgal-ah Samuel hong pailo a, ama kiang panin mite kithehthang hi
Tua ahih ciangin Saul in, “Meihal biakna leh thunuama biakna hih lai kei kiangah hong paipih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna a pia hi
Meihal biakna a piak a man khit phetin Samuel hong tung a, amah a dawn ding leh a hopih dingin Saul paikhia hi
Samuel in, “Bang hih na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Saul in, “Kei kiang panin mite kithehthangin, a ni kiseh sungin nang lah hong tunglo a, Mikmash-ah Filistia-te a kikhopna ka muh ciangin

keimah in, ‘Tu-in Filistia-te keimah hong hih dingin Gilgal-ah hong paisuk ding uh a, keimah in Topa' maipha ka ngen nai kei hi,’ ka ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin keimahmah kisawl tawmin meihal biakna ka pia hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Na hai gamtat hi; Topa na Pasian' hong thupiakna na zui kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Israel-te tungah kumpi dingin nang leh na suanlekhakte a kipsaksuak ding ahi hi

Ahih hangin tu-in na ukna kizomsuak lo ding a, Topa in ama lungsim bangin mi khat zong khin hi. Topa in nang hong thupiak zuilo na hih manin ama mite tungah ulian dingin Topa in amah seh khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel dingin Gilgal panin Benjamin-te' gamsung Gibeah-ah paito hi. Tua ciangin Saul in amah tawh a om mite mihing za guk bang kaikhawmhi
Saul, a tapa Jonathan, leh amau tawh a om mite Benjamin-te' gamsung Gibeah-ah om uh hi. Ahih hangin Filistia-te in Mikmash-ah phual sat uh hi
Tua ciangin Filistia-te' giahphual panin galsimte pawl thumin hong kuankhia uh hi. Pawlkhatte Shual gam Ofrah lamah kihei-in
pawlkhatte Bethhoron lamah kihei a, pawlkhatte gamlak lam Zeboiim kuam a kimuh sukna gamgi lamah kihei uh hi
Tua laitakin Israel gamsung khempeuhah sikseek khat zong omlo hi. Tua ahih manin Filistia-te in, “Hebru mite in amau-a' dingin namsau ahi a, teipi ahi zongin hong seeksak khading hi,” a ci uh hi
Israel-te pen a lokhawhna tu, a hei, ahih kei leh a phiaukawi a seek hiam dingin Filistia-te kiangah paisuk zel uh hi
Lokhawhna tu leh tuzum seek hiam thaman hamu bang hi a, hei seek hiam thaman leh ciangkhutah sik phuh thaman mat khat bang ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin galdo-in Saul leh Jonathan tawh a om mite khat peuhpeuh khutsungah namsau ahi a, teipi ahi zongin omlo a, ahi zongin Saul leh a tapa Jonathan in nei uh hi
Tua ciangin Filistia mite in Mikmash paina ciangka a cing dingin mi sawl uh hi.
